title: aDNA Enterprise Adoption Checklist
desc: A procurement-ready evaluation guide for enterprise platform teams: compliance posture, session audit trail, federation surface, and integration with existing engineering practice.

title: Security & Disclosure — aDNA
desc: How to report a security vulnerability in the aDNA standard, templates, or site tooling — and what to expect from coordinated disclosure.

title: aDNA Compliance Walkthrough
desc: A procurement-style walkthrough of how how/sessions/ and who/governance/ answer the five questions every compliance reviewer asks about AI-assisted work.

title: aDNA for Researchers
desc: How research labs and science teams use aDNA to maintain knowledge provenance, reproducibility, and multi-agent context fidelity across long-running projects.

title: aDNA Teaching Kit
desc: A 3-week curriculum for teaching AI-augmented knowledge work — the 9 core tutorials in pedagogical order with week-by-week guidance for instructors.

title: aDNA Startup First Hour
desc: A 60-minute timeboxed quickstart for startup CTOs: clone, point an agent at CLAUDE.md, seed STATE.md, and file the first ADR. Your AI agent is project-aware by the end of the hour.

title: Organizational Context Graphs — the aDNA method
desc: A reproducible method for building, operating, and accessing organizational context graphs — living, machine-readable models of how a company actually works.
ogTitle: Organizational Context Graphs — the aDNA method
h1: Make an organization legible — to its people, and to AI.

title: How — aDNA
desc: Operational processes for aDNA — publishing pipelines, workshops, and lattice examples.

title: aDNA — Rosetta
desc: Self-referential aDNA documentation — teaches the standard by using the standard (Operation Rosetta).

desc: Astro 6 composable website builder; Production v1.0. Renamed from SiteForge.aDNA.
